summary: Made two surgical seam edits: reframed the opening to pick up the prior chapter's composure beat without repeating the same temporal entry shape, and tightened the closing handoff into chapter 4's records-alcove opening. Verified the local style bible contains no example_lines entries to replace.
edits: Reworked the first paragraph to begin from the cafeteria's sensory field, then restated that Gabriel was already out of sight.
Restored the prior chapter's 'nothing visible on her face' continuity through Marisol's controlled public posture.
Adjusted the final sentence so the chapter exits on Marisol starting up toward the records alcove.
